news:news.news:title: Reports indicate Iran is using children in security roles amid ongoing conflicts, while tensions in Lebanon and the kidnapping of a US journalist raise significant concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran's use of child soldiers, Israel's control over Lebanon, US journalist kidnapping, peacekeeper casualties in Lebanon, Italian murder inquiry

news:news.news:title: US fuel prices exceed $4 a gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.
news:news.news:keywords: US fuel prices rise, Iran war impact on markets, Washington state millionaire tax, OpenAI profitability concerns, Air Canada CEO resignation

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale features significant discounts on tech accessories, while notable advancements in AI and mobile technology continue to emerge.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Big Spring Sale discounts, Claude Code leak implications, ChatGPT integration with CarPlay, Samsung motion sickness app, Evercade handheld console features

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while Italy fails to qualify for a third consecutive World Cup.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods treatment news, Italy World Cup qualification, NFL replay rule changes, Mark Cuban Mavericks sale regrets, MLBPA lockout preparations

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into muscle growth during sleep, effective arthritis treatments, and cosmic phenomena that challenge existing theories.
news:news.news:keywords: sleep and muscle growth, non-drug arthritis treatments, cosmic explosions and physics, black holes and star formation, liquid behavior under stress

news:news.news:title: Spain has closed its airspace to US aircraft involved in the Iran war, following a denial of military base access to the US.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical tensions in Europe, Israeli law on death penalty, US military operations in Iran, cultural recognition in Australia, refugee policies in Germany

news:news.news:title: Brent crude oil prices surged to $116 a barrel amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, while US stock markets continued to decline for the fifth consecutive week.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price surge due to Middle East tensions, impact of US-Iran conflict on markets, Air Canada CEO resignation news, minimum wage increase campaigns in US, challenges for US border businesses

news:news.news:title: Rec Room, a competitor to Roblox, is shutting down despite having over 150 million users and a peak valuation of $3.5 billion.
news:news.news:keywords: Rec Room shutdown news, Amazon Big Spring Sale highlights, new smart lock technology, advancements in packaging, interoperable video calls between iPhone and Android

news:news.news:title: The Final Four for Women's March Madness is set with Texas and South Carolina advancing, while the NBA sees significant player developments and challenges in officiating.
news:news.news:keywords: Women's March Madness updates, NBA player controversies, MLB officiating challenges

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into sleep's impact on health, the effectiveness of non-drug therapies for arthritis, and new cosmic phenomena.
news:news.news:keywords: sleep and muscle growth, non-drug treatments for arthritis, cosmic explosions and physics, supermassive black holes, Big Bang theories

news:news.news:title: China Bans 'Bone Ash Apartments' as Burial Practices Spark Controversy Amid Rising Concerns
Spain Bans US Aircraft as Brent Oil Prices Soar to $116 Amid Middle East Crisis
